title: Revival Totem
description: Adds a craftable totem of revival to revive your friends in hardcore mode when eaten
body:
Obtain an enchanted golden apple, totem of undying, and 7 blackstone. Once eaten, a random online spectator will be revived in your hardcore world.

![Totem of Revival Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c4685e19fb6d666a3955e849ef52fc2f211afe.png)
